title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Texas Instruments India

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Texas Instruments India
jsonLd.description:
Texas Instruments India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Software Engineer for our Madurai operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Texas Instruments India:
Texas Instruments India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in JavaScript

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Texas Instruments India!
jsonLd.skills: Microservices, Machine Learning, CI/CD, TypeScript, Docker, AWS, Rust, JavaScript
